items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a 15-2 career record and is on an eight-fight win streak.
items.quote: Abdul Husin 15 and two in his career. 5-0 in his last five. He is on a nice little eightight win streak.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off back-to-back finish losses.
Abdul Hussein possesses powerful hands and opportunistic grappling.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein is a killer. He's got powerful hands, opportunistic grappling.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein had a ton of success against Muhammad Mokaev.
items.quote: Just go back and watch his Muhammad Makayat fight where he had a ton of success.

items.claim: Cody Gibson uses his length well to set up strikes and defend takedowns.
items.quote: uses his length well. He is pretty long. He's very busy in exchanges, and he uses that length to set up his strikes, defend some takedowns.

items.claim: Cody Gibson has 14 takedowns in the UFC but is primarily a striker.
items.quote: He has 14 takedowns in the UFC, but he is primarily a striker.

items.claim: Cody Gibson can be held down if taken to the mat.
items.quote: If you do take him down, you can have some success holding him there.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off a 21-second knockout loss.
items.quote: He is coming off the 21 second knockout loss to Ori Lang.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is too old, too slow, and too chinny.
items.quote: A little too old, a little too slow, a little too chinny.
